variants.title: HiFi Filter OA 1115 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the SF Filter SAO56120
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter OA 1115 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the SF Filter SAO56120
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter OA 1115 Air/Oil Separator is HiFi's replacement to the SF Filter SAO56120. Easy to install and replace, the OA 1115 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR/OIL SEPARATOR, Dimension 1 (D1): 193.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 143.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 143.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 258.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 250.0 mm
